description: An X status link written as Source:, no quote in the syndication body. Unit path (no chase): the link is the source url with no date and no source media; the OP photo is proof. The archive path chases the linked status: chased_8500000000000000002.json then fills the source media (video) and the source url becomes the chased tweet's canonical url.
title: Geolocated industrial zone
